Project gfd D:\esaito_work\arcgis\2021\検査用\06037_象潟_sk2\SHP\gfd.shp GEOGCS["GCS_JGD_2000",DATUM["D_JGD_2000",SPHEROID["GRS_1980",6378137.0,298.257222101]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],UNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]] 'Tokyo_To_JGD_2011_2_NTv2 + JGD_2000_To_JGD_2011_NTv2_1' GEOGCS["GCS_Tokyo",DATUM["D_Tokyo",SPHEROID["Bessel_1841",6377397.155,299.1528128]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],UNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]] NO_PRESERVE_SHAPE # NO_VERTICAL
